_meta.notes: Slime-POV starting location for the v0.1 'survive the night' quest. Five rooms; one exit out, one branch toward danger. Ambient prose pool is form-agnostic (room itself, not the player) so the words `eyes`, `voice`, `walk` etc. may appear about NPCs but the pool itself does not narrate the player. The narrator merges these strings into prose. Edit room.connections only with eval re-runs (scenarios 16, 17, 19).

tagline: A wound in the rock the dungeon does not remember it has.
ambientPool: Far above and far away, a slow heaviness shifts through the stone. Something walks the floors of a deeper dungeon than this.
The air here is older than weather. It has not seen a wind in a long time.
Somewhere a single drop of water finds the floor and is forgotten.
The schist holds heat poorly; whatever was warm here has gone cold and stayed.
A faint vibration pulses through the rock at intervals — slower than a heart, faster than a tide.

rooms.summary: A narrow seam where two slabs of schist met badly when the ceiling came down. The space is cold and wet and smells of iron from a thin trail of dried blood.
ambientPool: The seam tightens around you as you settle. The two slabs above press their weight into the air.
Iron tastes the strongest here. Whatever bled, bled close.
From down-tunnel comes the sound of a single drop of water finding the floor, then another.
The stone is colder against your forward edge than it is behind.

hazards.narrative: The slabs are heavier than they look.

exits.narrative: The seam opens downward into a sloping run of loose stone.

rooms.summary: A long, gentle downward run scattered with loose schist pebbles. The walls feel close. The floor is dry where the seam was wet.
ambientPool: Pebbles loosen and skitter ahead of you, betraying every shift of mass.
Air moves here, thinly. Somewhere ahead is open space.
The slope is steeper than your awareness reads — gravity does much of the deciding.
Old bone-dust mixes with the rock; something ate something here, long ago.

exits.narrative: Back up the slope toward the seam.
Down the slope into open air and the sound of water.

rooms.summary: A cavern wide enough that returning vibrations take a moment. A stagnant pool covers the western quarter of the floor. Water finds the pool from somewhere above and somewhere distant.
ambientPool: A single drop falls from a great height, then another at a different interval. The pool answers with a ring you can feel in the floor.
The pool's chemistry is wrong: rust, oil, faint sourness. You should not drink here.
Something furred and warm lives nearby. Its breathing reaches you through the rock as a slow rhythm.
Fungus crusts a far wall in a low band; the chemistry of it is mild, almost kind.
The cavern is large enough that you cannot taste the whole of it from one place.

hazards.narrative: Absorbing pool-water risks the absorb_something_toxic hard-move.
Loud actions here may alert what dens to the east.

exits.narrative: Back up the slope you came down.
Toward the dim band of fungus on the west wall.
Toward the warm breathing in the east passage.

rooms.summary: A shallow recess in the cavern's western wall. The bioluminescent fungus glows weakly here. The chemistry is gentle. The air is warmer.
ambientPool: The fungus pulses a slow, almost breathing light. You do not perceive light, but you feel the small chemical shifts of its respiration.
There is no predator-scent here. Whatever made this alcove safe, made it safe a long time ago.
The wall behind the fungus is thinner than the rest of the cavern; vibrations from beyond carry a different tenor.
A patch of warmer stone retains the memory of something living.

exits.narrative: Through the thin wall behind the fungus, into a draft and an unfamiliar chemistry.
exits.discoverHint: The fungus-warm wall is thin. A sense_tremor or dissolve roll exposes the way through.

rooms.summary: A low chamber with a single dry sleeping-shape worn into the rock. The chemistry of bone, fur, and rancid oil is dense here. Something lives here. Something is watching.
ambientPool: The musk is intolerable to your essence. Hostile chemistry pulses with the breathing of the thing that beds here.
Bone-shards pepper the floor. Some are old. Some are fresh.
The thing has not noticed you yet. The pause cannot last.
There is a draft from the rear of the den; somewhere it leads upward.

hazards.narrative: A tunnel-predator beds here. Entry without a successful sense_tremor risks immediate attention.

exits.narrative: Back into the open cavern, faster than caution.

rooms.summary: A vertical fissure leading up to where the air is unfamiliar — dry, faintly green. The chemistry of the surface, or close to it. A way out, for a slime that survives the climb.
ambientPool: The air here moves. It has not been still in a long time.
The chemistry is wrong, but in a new way: pollen, distant smoke, growing things.
The fissure climbs further than your essence wants to commit, but it climbs.
Behind you, the cavern is already a memory.
rooms.exitNarrative: You have left the collapsed tunnel. The night, for now, has been survived.
